name: AirPods Pro 3 ReaLab BK5128 experimental PrecisEQ repository
maintainer: local experimental build by Hermes Agent
description: Experimental FIR repository generated from ReaLab Apple AirPods Pro 3 page. Source curve: Volume-6_ANC on (B&K 5128), firmware 8A357. The ReaLab Target Response 2024 is NOT baked into these FIRs; it is exported separately under target_import_material. Rig compensation to PrecisEQ/oratory basis is unresolved.
